title: manilkara bojeri
intro: Manilkara bojeri, also known as the Bojer's Manilkara or simply Manilkara, is a species of tree native to the tropical regions of the Indian Ocean. The medicinal properties of Manilkara bojeri lie in its leaves, bark, and roots, which are rich in flavonoids, tannins, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Manilkara bojeri include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood sugar levels, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Manilkara bojeri is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
